question.label: Gap awareness
question.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
question.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

answer: When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.

assessment.note: He names broad reviews leaving him unsure what to change first — a clear clarity gap with mild growth drag; no wellbeing signal.

new_queue.label: Broad reviews
new_queue.name: When reviews are broad, what specifically is missing for you?

new_queue.label: Growth blocker
new_queue.name: What is making growth feel stuck for you right now?

new_queue.label: Practice commitment
new_queue.name: What one habit do you want to practice before we meet again?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 5)

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.

I sometimes focus on polish and lose sight of the core message.
I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.
